movie.actors: Jason Bateman, Kim Darby, John Astin, Paul Sand
movie.plot: Todd Howard is a struggling teenager. Nothing seems to be going very well for him, until he turns into a wolf.
movie.title: Teen Wolf Too
movie.writer: Jeph Loeb (characters), Matthew Weisman (characters), Jeph Loeb (story), Matthew Weisman (story), Tim Kring (screenplay)
